title.en: The boundaries of the Heavenly Plains.

content.en:
The boundaries of the Heavenly Plains.

Ye Tian took Han Xuan here, and after tearing the barrier of the Tongtian Origin Domain, he entered the Primordial Black Sea region of the Tongtian Origin Domain, and hid his aura.

After all, he belongs to outsiders, and if he is discovered by the Sixfold Ancestors here, it will naturally not be good.

Moreover, according to Han Xuan's introduction, the Tongtian Origin Domain Realm is very powerful, and there is even more than one half-step sevenfold ancestor, and his current strength can't compete with a half-step sevenfold ancestor!

Therefore, after coming to the boundary of the Tongtian Plain Region, you still have to keep a low profile.

......

"Master, the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Domain is different from the Primordial Origin Boundary, the Primordial Origin Realm boundary is divided into areas according to the high-level Origin Domains, but the Primordial Black Sea Region of the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary does not have any intervals, but the entire Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary is shrouded by a large array, and the primordial Black Sea energy contained in the most central area is incomparably rich, and the resources here are also the richest, while the resources of the edge area are very barren!"

"According to energy and resources, the entire Tongtian Origin Realm is only divided into three realms, the upper realm, the middle realm, and the lower realm, and the strong are almost all concentrated in the upper realm. And those higher primordial domains were almost all born in the upper realm, the middle primordial realm was almost born in the middle realm, and the nether region gave birth to countless lower primordial domains. "

Han Xuan carefully introduced Ye Tian.

"Where are the resources from your past life?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"The Nether, the Lower Origin Domain—the North River Plain Domain!"

Han Xuan introduced.

The reason why she was placed in the Nether was because the Nether area was the largest, so she felt that the probability of being born in the Nether area was relatively high, so she put all the resources of her previous life in the Nether.

She felt that after she cultivated to the Triple Origin Ancestor realm, she could go to the Nether Realm to retrieve the resources!

Who would have thought that he would be directly reincarnated in the primeval realm.

Thankfully, she's back now.

"You lead the way, let's go directly to the Beihe Plains!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay, Master!"

Han Xuan took Ye Tian to the Beihe Plain Domain, the lower boundary area of the Tongtian Origin Domain.

......

North River Plains.

This is a very weak low-level Origin Domain, not even as good as the Origin Realm Sea.

It stands to reason that the Tongtian Origin Domain Realm is so powerful, even if it is a low-level Origin Domain, it should be very powerful.

However, the Primordial Black Sea region of the Upper Realm converging the energy of the entire Primordial Black Sea region in the Primordial Realm of Thoba, causing the Primordial Black Sea region of the Nether to be too barren.

And the Primordial Black Sea energy is the source of the low-level Primordial Domain energy, although the cultivators of the low-level Primordial Realm have not reached the first-level Primordial Ancestor realm and cannot enter the Primordial Black Sea, it seems that it has little impact.

However, the resources of the entire low-level origin domain are scarce, and the probability of the birth of the strong is also very low.

Moreover, the boundary of the primeval plain is an area that has been ignored, and the eyes of the upper realm do not pay attention to it at all, resulting in almost no inheritance here.

For example, in the Beihe Origin Domain, there is not even a single Primordial Ancestor, but there are dozens of pseudo-Primordial Ancestors.

And Han Xuan hid the resources here in his previous life, and it was impossible for the cultivators in the Beihe Plains to find out.

Soon, Ye Tian and Han Xuan came to the Beihe Plain Domain and entered here silently, and those pseudo-ancestors couldn't find it.

Han Xuan determined the direction, and took Ye Tian to a forbidden place in the Beihe Plain Region, where she took out a void ball hidden in a special time and space.

"Master, the thing is still there, I got it!"

Han Xuan said excitedly.

"That's good!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

He didn't ask what the treasures Han Xuan left behind in his previous life, no matter what treasures there were, they were also Han Xuan's treasures.

"Master, this is filial piety to you!"

Han Xuan took out some resources and gave them to Ye Tian.

"Really give it to me?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Of course, Master, your cultivation has improved, and your strength has become stronger, so you can protect me! Moreover, if I want to become a Sixfold Ancestor, I don't know how many long years it will take, and these resources are not needed at all now!" Han Xuan said.

"Okay, then I'll do it, just in time to accelerate the impact on the mid-stage realm of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!"

Ye Tian accepted the gift.

......

Ye Tian and Han Xuan didn't plan to leave the Tongtian Origin Boundary, after all, Han Xuan was more familiar with the Tongtian Origin Realm, so naturally they wanted to stay here.

And Ye Tian didn't need to go back, he had several replica bodies, so it was also a good choice to let a replica body stay at the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Domain.

The key is that the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary is even more powerful, and there is even a half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor.

And the primeval realm realm did not even have a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and the primeval Dao Alliance did not have a inheritance on how to advance to a half-step sevenfold ancestor.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to become a half-step sevenfold ancestor, he had to rely on the Tongtian Origin Domain boundary.

In the following years, Ye Tian and Han Xuan entered the Upper Realm, built a dojo in the primordial Black Sea region of the Upper Realm, and cultivated in the dojo.

And Han Xuan's body was also cultivating in the dojo, but the will clone went to the Tongtian Origin Realm to practice.

Time flies, and in the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to refine resources and improve his cultivation.

With the supply of a large number of resources, Ye Tian's cultivation is not slow.

And Han Xuan was also comprehending all kinds of extreme extreme paths, and she had obtained the resources prepared in her previous life, among which there were many treasures that could improve her comprehension of more extreme extreme paths, and even some of them were enough to make the sixfold peak ancestors excited.

With the help of these treasure resources, Han Xuan also gradually comprehended more extreme extreme paths, although it was still very difficult to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, but at least he saw a lot of hope.

Before you know it, another million years of the Primordial Era have passed.

"Three hundred and thirty-three extreme extremes!"

Han Xuan was very excited, in her previous life, she had only comprehended two hundred and seventy-two extreme extreme paths, but in this life, she had already comprehended three hundred and thirty-three extreme extreme paths, which was far beyond the background of her previous life.

Even if she achieves the Quadruple Ancestor now, her potential surpasses that of her previous life.

However, if you don't comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths, it will still be of little use, and you won't be able to form a qualitative improvement.

"I still have to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths as much as possible! I thought that I had made enough preparations in my previous life, but I didn't expect that a lot of resources were used, and it was still a little far away from the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, I underestimated the difficulty of comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths!" Han Xuan said secretly.

But if you think about it carefully, it's normal, if it's so easy to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, there won't be only one demon who comprehends the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths in the Heavenly Origin Realm!

That's right, there is only one Primordial Ancestor who has comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, which is the same as the Primeval Origin Realm before, but now it is not as good as the Primeval Realm Boundary.

Because there are now two Primordial Ancestors in the Primeval Realm Realm who have comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths!
